name: Elysian Studios
quote: Every great story begins with someone willing to listen deeply enough to hear it.
bio: The visionary behind Elysian Studios, dedicated to uncovering the stories of history's greatest minds and sharing them with the world.

name: Aryan Mehta
quote: History is not the past — it is the present speaking in another tongue.
bio: A researcher and writer specializing in South Asian history, philosophy, and the lives of revolutionaries who shaped the modern world.

name: Priya Sharma
quote: The most powerful frame is the one that disappears, leaving only the truth.
bio: A multidisciplinary designer whose visual language brings editorial gravitas and warmth to every chronicle published on Elysian.

name: Rohan Das
quote: Wisdom is not accumulated — it is remembered.
bio: A philosopher and essayist with a particular fascination for ancient Indian and Greek thought. Rohan brings rigour and poetry to every piece.

name: Leila Nair
quote: The boundary between art and science is an invention of people who understood neither.
bio: A science communicator who writes about the inner lives of scientists — their doubts, their obsessions, and the human cost of discovery.

name: Kavya Iyer
quote: A story unread is a universe that never existed.
bio: Kavya ensures that Elysian's stories reach the readers who need them most — blending technical precision with editorial sensitivity.
